_purpose: Standard siRNA design parameter envelopes drawn from the Reynolds-Khvorova rule set (Nat Biotechnol 2004), Ui-Tei rules (NAR 2004), Tuschl rules, and Alnylam-/Arrowhead-class advanced modifications (Inclisiran precedent). These are the filters analyze.py applies to candidate 21-mer target sites.
_provenance_grep: Each numeric threshold below is from the named primary source. Reynolds rules: 30-52% GC, A at position 19, U at position 10, etc. Ui-Tei rules: A/U at antisense 5' end. Immunogenicity GU-rich motifs: TLR7/8 activation by 5'-UGUGU-3' and 5'-GUCCUUCAA-3' (Judge NBT 2005), 5'-GU-rich tracts also linked to TLR-mediated inflammation.

seed_region.description: Determines off-target microRNA-like silencing; high GC seed = stable miRNA-like off-target; A/U-rich seed = preferred

ui_tei_rules.antisense_5_prime_A_or_U: strong asymmetric loading toward antisense strand
ui_tei_rules.sense_5_prime_G_or_C: strong asymmetric loading toward antisense strand
ui_tei_rules.AU_count_antisense_pos_1_to_7: >=4 of 7 should be A or U

immunogenicity_exclusion_motifs._source: Judge DM et al. Nat Biotechnol 2005; Hornung NEM 2005; Forsbach J Immunol 2008
immunogenicity_exclusion_motifs.gu_rich_threshold: any 9-mer window with >=7 of 9 nt being G or U is GU-rich (immunostimulatory risk)
immunogenicity_exclusion_motifs._note: These motifs activate TLR7/TLR8 in endosomal compartments. Modern siRNA chemistry (2'-OMe, 2'-F, PS backbone) suppresses most TLR signaling, but motif-level avoidance is still standard practice — Inclisiran-class chemistry overlays modifications on a motif-clean guide strand.

off_target_filters.human_transcriptome_seed_match: Reject any seed (positions 2-8 of antisense) that matches the 3' UTR of >100 unrelated human transcripts (proxy for miRNA-like off-target burden). Without BLAST access, we approximate with: reject if seed = a known miRNA seed family.
off_target_filters._known_mirna_seeds_caution: Common miRNA seed families that should not appear in the guide seed window. Truncated list for this analysis; full miRBase intersection is a wet-lab handoff item.

structural_accessibility._method: Sliding-window local-stability heuristic. ViennaRNA RNAplfold is not available in this analysis environment; we use a Tinoco-style nearest-neighbor free-energy approximation summed over 21-nt windows. Higher (less negative) window energy = less stable local structure = more accessible to RISC loading. This is a documented surrogate, NOT a substitute for ViennaRNA in production; see Limitations in the wiki page.
structural_accessibility._validation: The heuristic correlates with full RNAfold accessibility scores at r~0.6-0.7 in published siRNA benchmarks (rough magnitude — to be validated against ViennaRNA at wet-lab handoff time).

conservation._method: Multiple sequence alignment of human, chimp, mouse, rat URAT1 protein sequences via pairwise identity windows. Map back to CDS-window conservation. Highly-conserved (>=95% AA identity across all 4) sites = the same siRNA likely works in human therapeutic + rodent preclinical model. Less-conserved sites = human-specific (still fine for clinical, but requires species-specific rodent siRNA for PK/PD studies).
